summary: This document outlines the Clinical Evaluation Plan for the 'AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform,' a medical device software designed for UK GP practices. It details regulatory compliance strategies under EU MDR 2017/745, including device description, intended purpose, safety claims, and literature search methodologies. The plan establishes the framework for validating clinical performance and safety before market release.
